[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100111000 4
1 110011001 5
2 000101101 4
3 111110111 8
4 111111011 8
5 011111111 8
6 110111010 6
7 111011101 7

12 21 111011110 7
23 32 101111100 6

67 76 111110101 7
70 07 011110111 7

02 20 011111111 8 match 5
13 31 110111010 6 match 6
24 42 111011101 7 match 7
35 53 100111101 6
46 64 111011101 7 match 7
57 75 011111101 7

71 17 111111011 8 match 4

61 16 111011111 8

37 73 111111001 7
